card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control. Flashback {5}{U}{U}

card.name: Cosmic Epiphany
card.text: Draw cards equal to the number of instant and sorcery cards in your graveyard.
card.flavor: The dawn of a new day in a new world brings the dawn of a new idea.

card.name: Culling Ritual
card.text: Destroy each nonland permanent with mana value 2 or less. Add {B} or {G} for each permanent destroyed this way.

card.name: Damnable Pact
card.text: Target player draws X cards and loses X life.
card.flavor: Some contracts will haunt you for the rest of your life.

card.name: Deafening Clarion

card.name: Doomskar
card.text: Destroy all creatures. Foretell {1}{W}{W}

card.name: Escape to the Wilds
card.text: Exile the top five cards of your library. You may play cards exiled this way until the end of your next turn. You may play an additional land this turn.

card.name: Mind Shatter
card.text: Target player discards X cards at random.
card.flavor: Target player discards X cards at random.

card.name: Mystic Genesis
card.text: Counter target spell. Create an X/X green Ooze creature token, where X is that spell's mana value.
card.flavor: Anything can be transformed into whatever you want it to be, you jujst need the right ingredients.

card.name: Profound Journey
card.text: Return target permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Rebound

card.name: Rite of Harmony
card.text: Whenever a creature or enchantment you control enters this turn, draw a card. Flashback {2}{G}{W}
card.flavor: The Order of Enchantment believed everyone could live as one. Anyone who fell out of line soon found themselves believing wholeheartedly in the Order's goals.

card.name: Siphon Insight
card.text: Look at the top two cards of target opponent's library. Exile one of them face down and put the other on the bottom of that library. You may play the exiled card for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast that spell. Flashback {1}{U}{B}

card.name: Splendid Reclamation
card.text: Return all land cards from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.
card.flavor: The view of the worlds sparkling on Yggdrasil's branches was marvelous; a view worth fighting for.

card.name: Stitch in Time
card.text: Flip a coin. If you win the flip, take an extra turn after this one.
card.flavor: It takes time to make time.

card.name: The End
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if your life total is 5 or less. Exile target creature or planeswalker. Search its controller's graveyard, hand, and library for any number of cards with the same name as that permanent and exile them. That player shuffles, then draws a card for each card exiled from their hand this way.

card.name: Collected Company
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. Put up to two creature cards with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Recycle the rest.

card.name: Transmogrify
card.text: Exile target creature. That creature's controller reveals cards from the top of their library until they reveal a creature card. That player puts that card onto the battlefield, then shuffles the rest into their library.

card.name: Vanishing Verse
card.text: Exile target monocolored permanent.

card.name: Wish
card.text: You may play a card from your spellbook this turn.
card.flavor: "It's said there is a stone deep within these halls. A stone that can grant you your wildest dreams."

card.name: Abundant Harvest
card.text: Choose land or nonland. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a card of the chosen kind. Put that card into your hand and recycle the rest.

card.name: Act of Treason
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn.
card.flavor: Your closest allies are those you should be most wary of.

card.name: Behold the Multiverse
card.text: Scry 2, then draw two cards. Foretell {1}{U}

card.text: Create a 1/1 green Squirrel creature token. Flashback {1}{G}

card.name: Dissipate

card.flavor: "All things come from the aether, all things must return to the aether. I'm just helping it on its journey."

card.name: Leyline of Chance

card.name: Leyline of Convergence

card.name: Leyline of the Deep

card.name: Leyline of the Wilds
card.text: As you cascade, you may put a land card from among the exiled cards into your hand.

card.name: Leyline Tracker

card.flavor: The only constants in a world of chaos were caused by leylines running through a world. Mapping these leylines became top priority for the faeocracy.

card.flavor: Felix turned around as the cupboard door slammed shut. He was alone.

card.name: Lonely Maiden
card.text: Eternal Day Enchantment spells you control have convoke Humans.

card.name: Lubia Exhibitionist
card.text: Haste Whenever Lubia Exhibitionist or another undead creature enters the battlefield under your control, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn — • Create a blood token. • Wound target player.

card.name: Lucid Dreams
card.text: Draw X cards, where X is the number of card types among cards in your graveyard.
card.flavor: The medicine helped you sleep, but it also made you fully aware of the horrors that were seeping into your dreams.

card.name: Lupa, Leader of the Pack
card.text: Haste, Trample As long as Balnik's Moon is on the battlefield, Lupa, Leader of the Pack isn't a Human. As long as Balnik's Moon is on the battlefield, Wolves and Werewolves you control have trample. Endless Night

card.name: Lupine Prototype
card.text: Lupine Prototype can't attack or block unless a player has no cards in hand.

card.name: Lurking Shadow
card.text: Flying Delirium — {B}: Lurking Shadow gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Activate only if there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Lust for Blood
card.text: Destroy target non-undead creature.

card.name: Lycan Hunter
card.text: As long as an opponent controls an undead creature, this spell can't be countered. Lifelink If a source you control would deal damage to an undead creature, it deals that much damage plus one instead. {1}{R}{W}, {T}: Lycan Hunter deals 2 damage to target undead creature.

card.name: Lycanthropy
card.text: Enchant Human or Werewolf Enchanted creature is a Werewolf in addition to its other types. As long as Balnik's Moon is on the battlefield, enchanted creature isn't a Human. Enchanted creature gets +2/+2.
card.flavor: After a run in with a werewolf, Felix began to feel different somehow.

card.name: Make a Dramatic Entrance
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. You may reveal any number of Human cards from among them. Put up to two of those cards onto the battlefield and the rest into your hand. Then recycle any revealed cards not put into your hand.
card.flavor: Doug threw open the doors with flair, as lightning struck behind him, announcing his arrival.

card.name: Melancholy Wail
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. If you control an undead as you cast this spell, instead return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Midnight Brawl
card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. Endless Night

card.name: Midnight Haunting
card.text: Create two 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens with flying.

card.name: Midnight Hunter
card.text: As long as Balnik's Moon is on the battlefield, Midnight Hunter isn't a Human.
card.flavor: If you hear their howls, it's too late.

card.name: Militia Rallier
card.text: Militia Rallier can't attack alone. Whenever Militia Rallier attacks, untap target creature.

card.name: Mindless Rot
card.text: Target opponent discards a card and mills a card.
card.flavor: The zombie invasion initially spread through a fungal infection, before it became epidemic in Balnik.

card.name: Moonlit Transformation
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Endless Night

card.name: Moorland Drifter
card.text: Delirium — Moorland Drifter has flying as long as there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard.
card.flavor: It has no apparent purpose or direction. It simply drifts, buoyed by breezes both tangible and otherworldly.

card.name: Necroduality
card.text: Whenever a nontoken Zombie enters the battlefield under your control, create a token that's a copy of that creature.
card.flavor: Hykul's necromancy was so strong, that when one warrior fell, from his corpse would two zombies arise.

card.name: Night of the Hunt
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gets +1/+0 and gains infiltrate. If the target is a Werewolf, it also gains double strike.

card.name: Night of the Living Dead
card.text: Endless Night Until end of turn, undead creatures you control have deathtouch and "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield with a -1/-1 counter and a finality counter on it."

card.name: Niketas, Forlorn Spirit
card.text: Vigilance, Ward {1} {1}{W}{U}: Exile another target Spirit or enchantment you control, then return it to the battlefield. It gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Nomadic Werewolf
card.text: As long as Balnik's Moon is on the battlefield, Nomadic Werewolf isn't a Human. {T}: Add {G}. If Nomadic Werewolf isn't Human, instead add {R}{G}.

card.name: Obstinate Jiangshi
Offering to the Dark Lord
card.text: When Offering to the Dark Lord enters the battlefield, draw three cards and create three 2/2 black Zombie creature tokens with decayed. At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice a creature and discard a card.

card.name: Old Laboratory
Pack Pup
card.text: Whenever another Wolf or Werewolf enters the battlefield under your control, Pack Pup gets +1/+1 until end of turn. As long as Balnik's Moon is on the battlefield, Pack Pup isn't a Human. Eternal Day

card.name: Persistent Haunting
card.text: When Persistent Haunting enters the battlefield and whenever you draw a card, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Phantom Musician
card.text: Flying When Phantom Musician deals combat damage to a player, look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a Spirit or enchantment card from among them and put it into your hand. Recycle the rest.

card.name: Plague Doctor
card.text: When Plague Doctor enters the battlefield, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. If a creature card is exiled in this way, you gain life equal to its power. {T}: Remove a -1/-1 counter from target creature.

card.name: Plundered Husk
card.text: When Plundered Husk enters the battlefield, draw a card and you lose 1 life. Resurrect {1}{B}

card.name: Possessed Doll
card.text: When Possessed Doll enters the battlefield, choose target creature you don't control. You may exchange control of Possessed Doll and the target.

card.name: Priest of Rhadaath
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Prince of Rats
card.text: Menace Whenever Prince of Rats enters the battlefield or attacks, create a blood token. Whenever you discard a card, create a 1/1 black Rat creature token with "This creature can't block."

card.name: Prolonged Bleeding
card.text: Enchant player If enchanted player would take damage, instead prevent that damage and wound that player that many times. Enchanted player has a maximum hand size of five and can't have no maximum hand size. {B}{R}: Sacrifice Prolonged Bleeding.

card.name: Prophetic Raven
card.text: Flying When Prophetic Raven enters the battlefield, surveil 2. Delirium — {2}{U}{U}: Draw a card. Activate only if there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard.
card.flavor: "Nevermore..."

card.name: Punishing Curse
card.text: Enchant player Whenever a source deals damage to enchanted player, wound that player.

card.name: Rabid Gremishka
card.text: Haste Delirium — When Rabid Gremishka dies, if there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard, put a -1/-1 counter on target creature you don't control.

card.name: Radiant Smiteᴹᵂ
card.text: Target opponent exiles a creature with the greatest power among creatures they control. If an undead creature is exiled in this way, Radiant Smite deals 3 damage to that opponent.

card.name: Rampaging Huntmaster
card.text: Haste As long as Balnik's Moon is on the battlefield, Rampaging Huntmaster isn't a Human. As long as Rampaging Huntmaster isn't Human, whenever it is dealt damage, it deals that much damage to any target.

card.name: Ravaged Biter
card.text: Whenever Ravaged Biter attacks, up to one target creature gets -X/-0 until end of turn, where X is Ravaged Biter's power. Resurrect {5}{U}

card.name: Ravished Glutton
card.text: Menace When Ravished Glutton deals combat damage to a player, create a blood token.

card.name: Reconstruct the Body
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. If that creature has resurrect, you may instead exile it, then return it to its owner's hand. Surveil 1.
card.flavor: As the zombies evolved, they began to learn. Worst of all, they learned they could stitch themselves back together.

card.name: Remove Curse
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target Curse. • You gain hexproof until end of turn. • You gain 3 life.

card.name: Replicating Zombie
card.text: When Replicating Zombie leaves the battlefield, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. Resurrect {2}{B}

card.name: Rest in Peace
card.text: When Rest in Peace enters the battlefield, exile all graveyards. If a card or token would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.

card.name: Restless Jiangshi
card.text: When Restless Jiangshi enters the battlefield, tap target creature you don't control. Resurrect {1}{U}

card.name: Resurrect
card.text: Return target creature from your graveyard to the battlefield with a -1/-1 counter and a finality counter on it.

card.name: Rhadaath Cultist
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your end step, if you've lost life this turn, put a -1/-1 counter on target creature you don't control.

card.name: Rickety Tower
Rival Packleader
card.text: Trample As long as Balnik's Moon is on the battlefield, Rival Packleader isn't a Human. Whenever the world changes, create a 3/3 red and green Human Werewolf creature token with "As long as Balnik's Moon is on the battlefield, this creature isn't a Human."

card.name: Roaming Ghostlight
card.text: Flying When Roaming Ghostlight enters the battlefield, return up to one target non-Spirit creature to its owner's hand.
card.flavor: Some who die senseless deaths return as formless spirits, seeking answers where there are none.

card.name: Rotshell Crab
card.text: Whenever Rotshell Crab or another undead creature enters the battlefield under your control, target player mills two cards.
card.flavor: The infection spread to even the most unexpected places. Nowhere was safe.

card.name: Rotting Earth
card.text: Search your library for two basic land cards. Put one of them onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your graveyard. Delirium — If there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard, instead put both lands onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Rotting Ruins
card.text: Rotting Ruins enters the battlefield tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {B}. {1}{U}{B}, {T}: Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed.

card.name: Rowdy Mob
card.text: Rowdy Mob enters the battlefield with five -1/-1 counters on it. Whenever one or more other creatures enter the battlefield under your control, remove a -1/-1 counter from Rowdy Mob.
card.flavor: "Those who aren't welcome will soon know it!"

card.name: Rug of Smothering
card.text: Flying Whenever a player casts a spell, they lose 1 life for each spell they've cast this turn.
card.flavor: Even one foot wrong can awaken the worst horrors in the most unassuming places.

card.name: Run Away
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. Delirium — If there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed.

card.name: Safety in Numbers
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1. As long as you control three or more creatures, creatures you control have hexproof from undead. As long as you control six or more creatures, creatures you control can't be damaged by undead.

card.name: Saltsilver Bolt
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Saltsilver Bolt: Exile target player's graveyard. {4}, {T}, Sacrifice Saltsilver Bolt: Saltsilver Bolt deals 3 damage to target creature. If an undead creature dealt damage in this way would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Sanguimancer
card.text: When Sanguimancer enters the battlefield, create a blood token. {B/R}, Sacrifice a blood token: Wound target player.

card.name: Sanguine Blaze
card.text: Sanguine Blaze deals 4 damage to target creature. Wound that creature's controller.

card.name: Sanguine Kiss
card.text: Choose one or both — • Target creature gains indestructible until end of turn. • Target Vampire gets +1/+0 and gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Savage Annihilator
card.text: Trample As long as Balnik's Moon is on the battlefield, Savage Annihilator isn't a Human. Whenever the world changes, destroy up to one artifact or non-World enchantment.

card.name: Scour the Laboratory
card.text: Delirium — This spell costs {2} less to cast if there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard. Draw three cards.

card.name: Scratching Werewolf
card.text: Haste As long as Balnik's Moon is on the battlefield, Scratching Werewolf isn't a Human. Whenever the world changes, Scratching Werewolf deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Sephiora Paragon
card.text: Flying You may look at the top card of your library at any time. Once during each of your turns during your main phase, you may play an Angel, Human, enchantment, or land card from the top of your deck. When Sephiora Paragon dies, you gain 4 life.

card.name: Sephiora's Devotee
Sephiora's Guidance
card.text: Flash When Sephiora's Guidance enters the battlefield, target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn. Whenever a creature with power 2 or less enters the battlefield under your control, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Sephiora's Messenger
card.text: Flying As long as your life total is at least 5 greater than your starting life total, Sephiora's Messenger gets +2/+2 and gains "When this creature deals combat damage to a player, scry 2."

card.name: Shambling Blight
Shambling Siege
card.text: Choose one or both — • Tap target creature and put two stun counters on it. • Target Zombie gets +1/+1 and gains chilltouch until end of turn. Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed.

card.name: Sharpened Pitchfork
Sheltered Steppe
card.text: Sheltered Steppe enters the battlefield tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {W}. {G}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice Sheltered Steppe: Target Human you control gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Shivers Down Your Spine
card.text: Enchant creature When Shivers Down Your Spine enters the battlefield, tap enchanted creature and put a stun counter on it. Whenever you cast an undead spell, put a stun counter on enchanted creature.

card.name: Shred of Lost Hope
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature becomes an Angel in addition to its other types, gets +2/+2 and gains flying, hexproof, and indestructible.

card.name: Sleep-Paralysis Demon
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Chilltouch Whenever a creature an opponent controls becomes tapped, put a stun counter on that creature.

card.name: Slithering Buba
card.text: When Slithering Buba enters the battlefield, mill four cards, then you may return a permanent card from among the cards milled in this way to your hand.

card.name: Smouldering Stick
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and gains "When this creature becomes blocked, it deals 1 damage to each creature blocking it." Equip {1}{R}
card.flavor: After being spooked by the branch, Trivaz took his frustration out on it, leaving it smoking.

card.name: Snagging Corpsecreeper
card.text: Reach Delirium — {1}{G}, Sacrifice Snagging Corpsecreeper: Destroy target creature with flying. Activate only if there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard.
card.flavor: With vines wrapped around his leg, Doug knew he was doomed as he saw his companions abandon him without remorse.

card.name: Socket Hoarder
card.text: Whenever Socket Hoarder or another undead creature enters the battlefield under your control, surveil 1. Resurrect {3}{U}

card.name: Soul-Stealing Monk
card.text: When Soul Stealing Monk enters the battlefield, exile target creature you don't control until Soul-Stealing Monk leaves the battlefield. Soul-Stealing Monk has all talent keywords of cards exiled with it.

card.name: Spawn of Rhadaath
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your end step, create a 1/1 black Vampire creature token with lifelink for each opponent who lost life this turn.

card.name: Spirit of the Mist
card.text: Eternal Day
card.flavor: "They say the souls of those who enter the mist become cursed to wander the swamps forever..."

card.name: Stab in the Dark
card.text: Endless Night Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Stabbed in the Back
card.text: Choose a new target for target instant or sorcery spell that targets a single creature. Wound that spell's controller.

card.name: Staunch the Wound
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards. If a condition is discarded in this way, Staunch the Wound deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Steal Essence
card.text: Choose one or both — • Draw a card and you gain 3 life. • Exile target Spirit you control. Return that card to the battlefield at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Stolen Salves
card.text: Target player draws X cards and loses X life, where X is the amount of life you've gained this turn.

card.name: Strategic Support
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+2 until end of turn. If that creature is a Human, it also gains lifelink until end of turn.
card.flavor: 'I've got your back!" —Last words of Thomas Stansfield

card.name: Stravali of the Tower
card.text: Infiltrate When Stravali of the Tower enters the battlefield, draw two cards, then discard two cards and create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. {R}: Target undead creature you control gets +2/+0 and gains decayed until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Stravali's Madness
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an undead creature. Gain control of target creature. Put a decayed counter on it.

card.name: Strict Bogeyman
card.text: Ward — Tap three creatures As long as you've gained life this turn, Scrict Bogeyman has first strike.

card.name: Stubborn Phantasm
card.text: Flying When Stubborn Phantasm enters the battlefield, you may put an enchantment card you own with mana value 3 or less from your spellbook into your hand.

card.name: Swarm of Zombies
card.text: Create X 2/2 black Zombie creature tokens with decayed. Zombies you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Take Up Your Arms
card.text: Choose one or both — • Attach target Aura or Equipment you control to target Human you control. • Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Taste of Your Own Blood
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. It gains haste and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to its owner, wound that player." until end of turn. Untap it.
card.flavor: "The vampires could turn any of us into one of them. Be ready to strike down your friends if you have to."

card.name: Terror of the Graveyard
card.text: Trample This spell costs {1} less to cast for each card type among cards in your graveyard.

card.text: Destroy target nonbasic land. It's controller creates a Mountain land token. Endless Night

card.text: Menace Delirium — When The Headless Horseman enters the battlefield, if there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard, destroy target creature you don't control. Undead creatures you control have menace.

card.name: The May-Selene
card.text: Flying Whenever The May-Selene attacks, you may return any number of undead creature cards that don't share a creature type with each other from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped and attacking. Sacrifice those creatures at the end of combat. Crew 6 Resurrect {4}{W/B}

card.text: Lifelink At the beginning of your end step, you may exile target nontoken creature with mana value X or less, where X is the amount of life you gained this turn. Its owner may play that card for as long as it remains in exile.

card.name: Thief of Sanguine
card.text: When Thief of Sanguine enters the battlefield, wound each opponent. Whenever Thief of Sanguine deals combat damage to a player, create a blood token and that player discards a card.

card.name: Threatening Companion
card.text: Chilltouch As long as it's your turn, Threatening Companion has first strike.

card.name: Threatening Silhouette
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you gain life, put a -1/-1 counter on up to one target creature.

card.name: Tina Carpenter
card.text: Lifelink Whenever another Human you control becomes the target of a spell or ability, copy that spell or ability. The copy targets Tina Carpenter. Eternal Day

card.name: Torch the Threats
card.text: Choose one — • Put a finality counter on target creature. Torch the Threats deals 1 damage to the target. • Put a finality counter on target artifact, then destroy it.
card.flavor: If in doubt, kill it with fire.

card.name: Toxicology Expert
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever a creature you control with deathtouch deals combat damage to a player, wound that player.

card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Destroy target creature.

card.text: +1: When you cast your next instant or sorcery spell this turn, draw a card.
-1: Add {U}{R}. Spend this mana only to cast instant or sorcery spells.
-7: Until end of turn, instant and sorcery spells in your graveyard have flashback. Their flashback cost is equal to their mana cost.

card.name: Two-Faced Nightmare
card.text: As long as Balnik's Sun is on the battlefield, Two-Faced Nightmare has skulk. As long as Balnik's Moon is on the battlefield, T'wo-Faced Nightmare has menace.

card.text: Return target creature with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a -1/-1 counter and a finality counter on it. It fights up to one target creature you don't control.
card.flavor: Even death won't stop the wolves urge to fight.

card.text: Haste, Reach When Unsettling Scarecrow dies, create a 1/1 black Rat creature token with "This creature can't block."

card.name: Unwilling Invitation
card.text: Goad target creature. It loses all abilities for as long as it's goaded.
card.flavor: "Dear guests, you are cordially and forcefully invited to this evening's entertainment. Heed this intimation."

card.text: Flying, Lifelink {1}{B}, Sacrifice Vampire Bat: Wound target player. Create a blood token.

card.text: Wound target opponent, then that player discards a card. Create a blood token.

card.text: Hexproof from undead Players can't cast undead spells from graveyards or activate abilities of undead cards in graveyards. When Van Nelson dies, you may pay {G/U} any number of times. When you do, recycle up to that many target cards from all player's graveyards and you gain that much life.

card.text: Choose one or both — • Vicious Chase deals 2 damage to each creature. • Target Wolf or Werewolf gets +1/+1 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.text: Deck of Many Things — When you cast this spell, you get a card counter, then roll a d20. If the result less than or equal to the number of card counters you have, you lose the game. Tenacity When D.O.M.T. Rogue deals combat damage to a player, that player discards a card.

card.name: DOMT Ruin
card.text: Deck of Many Things — When you cast this spell, you get a card counter, then roll a d20. If the result less than or equal to the number of card counters you have, you lose the game. Destroy target artifact or land.

card.name: DOMT Skull

Gift an Avatar of Death Whenever an Avatar creature you don't control dies, draw three cards, create three tapped jet tokens, and you gain 3 life.

card.name: DOMT Star
card.text: Deck of Many Things — When you cast this spell, you get a card counter, then roll a d20. If the result less than or equal to the number of card counters you have, you lose the game. Look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of lands you control. Put up to two cards from among them into your hand, then recycle the rest.

card.name: DOMT Sun
card.text: Deck of Many Things — When you cast this spell, you get a card counter, then roll a d20. If the result less than or equal to the number of card counters you have, you lose the game. Reveal an artifact card from your spellbook and put it into your hand.

card.name: DOMT Talons

card.name: DOMT The Fates
card.text: Deck of Many Things — When you cast this spell, you get a card counter, then roll a d20. If the result less than or equal to the number of card counters you have, you lose the game. Choose three. You may choose the same mode more than once — • Target player creates a 2/2 green Avatar creature token. • Recycle target artifact or enchantment. • You gain 3 life.

card.name: DOMT The Fool
card.text: Deck of Many Things — When you cast this spell, you get a card counter, then roll a d20. If the result less than or equal to the number of card counters you have, you lose the game. When D.O.M.T. The Fool enters the battlefield, target player draws a card and loses 2 life. If D.O.M.T. The Fool would die, exile it instead.

card.name: DOMT The Jester
card.text: Deck of Many Things — When you cast this spell, you get a card counter, then roll a d20. If the result less than or equal to the number of card counters you have, you lose the game. When D.O.M.T. The Jester enters the battlefield, draw two cards. If D.O.M.T. The Jester would die, exile it instead.

card.name: DOMT The Void
card.text: Deck of Many Things — When you cast this spell, you get a card counter, then roll a d20. If the result less than or equal to the number of card counters you have, you lose the game. Exile target creature you don't control. Search its controller's graveyard, hand, library, and spellbook for any number of cards with the same name, exile them, then shuffle. Then that player conjures a frostbite card into their hand for each card exiled from their hand in this way.

card.name: DOMT Throne
card.text: Deck of Many Things — When you cast this spell, you get a card counter, then roll a d20. If the result less than or equal to the number of card counters you have, you lose the game. As D.O.M.T. Throne enters the battlefield, choose an opponent to protect it. When D.O.M.T. Throne enters the battlefield or is defeated, you may search your library for a Plains card and put it into your hand. You gain 3 life.

card.name: DOMT Vizier
card.text: Deck of Many Things — When you cast this spell, you get a card counter, then roll a d20. If the result less than or equal to the number of card counters you have, you lose the game. Infiltrate, Vigilance D.O.M.T. Vizier can't be blocked.

card.name: Drummers Drumming

card.name: Dweller of the Frozen Abyss

card.name: Eater of Beasts

card.name: Endearing Dame

card.name: Feuefel's Mirror
card.text: If a player would gain life, they lose that much life instead. If a creature would have its power or toughness changed, that change is reversed. If a player would draw a card other than the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, they discard a card instead.

card.name: Feuefel

If the number of land cards exiled is greater than twice the number of opponents you have, recycle this spell. Otherwise, each opponent loses life equal to the total mana value of cards they exiled.

card.name: Rosso, the Fortunate

card.name: Rule of the Four Regents
card.text: Look at the top four cards of your library. Reveal any number of legendary cards from among them and put them into your hand. Create a 1/1 green snow Elf creature token and you gain 1 life for each card put into your hand in this way. Recycle the rest.

card.name: Season's Miracle
card.text: If you have no cards in your library, conjure 60 cards named Present into your library. If you have no cards in hand, draw seven cards. If you have 0 or less life, you gain 20 life.

card.name: Sentinel Shield
Silent Night
card.text: Exile target artifact or creature with mana value less than or equal to the number of snow permanents you control.

card.name: Sleeps Until Marit Lage
card.text: Whenever another snow permanent enters the battlefield under your control, put an ice counter on each of Sleeps Until Marit Lage and that permanent. At the beginning of your upkeep, if there are 25 or more ice counters on Sleeps Until Marit Lage, sacrifice it. If you do, create Marit Lage, a legendary 20/20 black Avatar creature token with flying and indestructible.

card.name: Sleigh Ride
card.text: This spell costs 1 less to cast if it targets a snow creature. Exile target creature you control. Return it to the battlefield at the beginning of your next upkeep. It gets +3/+3 and gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Snow Angel
card.text: Flying Prehistoric — Whenever another creature with no abilities enters the battlefield under your control, conjure a frostbite card into your hand. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Snow Bee
card.text: Gift a Frostbite Flying When Snow Bee enters the battlefield, if the gift was promised, draw a card.

card.name: Snow Globe
card.text: Gift a Present Snow Globe enters the battlefield with an ice counter on it. It the gift was promised, it enters with three ice counters on it instead. {1}, {T}, Remove an ice counter: Scry 1, then draw a card.

card.name: Snowfather's Sleigh

card.name: Stalwart Reindeer

card.name: Swans-a-Swimming
card.text: Flying As long as you control a Bird with power 1 or less, Swans-a-Swimming can't be blocked.
card.flavor: On the seventh day, the Snowfather gifted the town swans to bring elegance and grace.

Whenever a creature enters the battlefield under your control, choose one — • Put a bind counter on that creature. • That creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. It can attack as though it had haste.

card.name: The Donkey

card.name: The Great Freeze
card.text: Destroy all nonsnow creatures.
card.flavor: When the god of fire was sealed away, the summer stopped coming. Eventually, eternal winter set in and everything froze.

card.name: The Rat King

card.name: The Snowfields

card.name: The Snowsleet Express

card.name: Tomb of Feuefel
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and put a blood counter on Tomb of Feuefel. Then if there are ten blood counters on Tomb of Feuefel, sacrifice it. When you do, search your graveyard, hand, library, or spellbook for a Demon or Devil card and put it onto the battlefield. If you searched your library, shuffle.

card.name: Unchanging Crocodile

card.name: Unintentional Sacrifice
card.text: Each player sacrifices a creature at random.
